fontShowcase.title: Fonts worth trying instead of Arial
fontShowcase.description: Onest stays for body copy, and Commissioner now handles headlines and accents. The previews below use the actual font, size, and weight design tokens.
fontShowcase.bodySample: Съешь ещё этих мягких французских булок, да выпей чаю.

reasons.onest: A soft modern sans: it reads naturally in Cyrillic and feels less overused than default system fonts.
reasons.commissioner: A confident accent family: strong in headlines, cards, and short promotional blocks.
